observations.text: Preserving the Learning section is exceptionally thorough with 7 concrete artifacts, each specifying file location, content summary, and named owner — far exceeding the 3-artifact minimum

## Situation Snapshot

An FCA audit on 2026-01-19 found that 6 weeks of order state transition records for regulated instruments were non-compliant with COBS 11.2A audit trail requirements. The root issue was a semantic mismatch: MJ's event-sourced architecture satisfied database-level durability (fsync) but not regulatory-level durability (synchronous commitment to a compliance store before client confirmation).
